rulings.Case Title: RESNICK, DOUGLAS MARK, AS TRUSTEE OF THE PEARL VS. ANGELA CRANDALL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION As To The First Cause Of Action Of Plaiantiff'S Complaint And For An Order For Writ Of Possession
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 29, 2014, line 5. PLAINTIFF RESNICK, DOUGLAS MARK's MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION GRANTED. Moving party shifted its burden and the opposing party failed to produce evidence creating a triable issue of fact as to the material facts. Probate Code 18102 and Leach v. Home Savings and Loan (1996) 185 Cal.App.3d 1295 are inapplicable as defendants had constructive knowledge of the substitution of trustee. Probate Code 18107. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH TIERNEY VS. NASIR JAVAID et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 29, 2014, line 6. DEFENDANTs NASIR JAVAID and DEJAUNA JOSEPH's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings DENIED. Defendants' reading and interpretation of the contractual provisions are not supported by the language of the contract. Specifically, defendants' suggestion that section 5(c) was operative only up to August 31, 2005 ("Entitlement Deadline") (See Reply 6:5-12), renders this section's condition precedent provision "if Purchaser has not terminated this Agreement" meaningless as Purchaser's right to terminate the Agreement did not ripen until August 21, 2005 ("If (1) Purchaser does not obtain the Entitlement on or before August 31, 2005 (the "Entitlement Deadline")¿, then"). = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH TIERNEY VS. NASIR JAVAID et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 29, 2014, line 6. CROSS DEFENDANTs JOSEPH TIERNEY and 376 CASTRO STREET, LLC's DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT SUSTAINED without leave to amend. Cross-Complainant failed to address what specific facts Cross-Complaint seeks to allege should leave to amend be granted. No amendment appears viable in light of events giving rise to causes of action/damages/relief taking place at the latest in September 2006. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: WATERVIEW DEVELOPMENT LLC VS. VINCENT T.C. TAI et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 29, 2014, line 14. DEFENDANT VINCENT TAI's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to the first cause of action to allege specific performance other than "tender the Property without the Sanger Easement" pursuant to written contract. Seller under the contract specifically warranted that there are no encumbrances "other than the easements, rights-of-way and other encumbrances or record." Section 4.01. Demurrer is overruled as to the fraud cause of action. All elements of fraud are sufficiently alleged, including reliance. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: WATERVIEW DEVELOPMENT LLC VS. VINCENT T.C. TAI et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 29, 2014, line 14. DEFENDANT VINCENT TAI's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Moot in light of ruling on demurrer. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: JIAMAO ENTERPRISE (USA) INC. VS. DANIEL E. OSUNDE
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 29, 2014, line 8. DEFENDANT DANIEL OSUNDE's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND GRANTED, judgment is set aside pursuant to CCP 473(d). Defendant provided evidence showing that the default was prematurely entered based on May 29, 2014 cancelations date. Plaintiff provided no meaningful opposition on this issue. = (501/AJR)
